SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
with ChaseProvider as (
select distinct
ent.NPI
,case when ifnull(hum.FN,'') <> '' then hum.FN else NULL end as ProvFirstName
,case when ifnull(hum.MN,'') <> '' then hum.MN else NULL END as ProvMiddle 
, case when ifnull(hum.LN,'') <> '' then hum.LN else NULL END as ProvLastName
,ent.Group as ProvIsGroup
,addr.Prac1stAddr as ProvAddr1
,case when addr.Prac2ndAddr <> '' then addr.Prac2ndAddr else NULL end as ProvAddr2 
,addr.Praccity as ProvCity
,addr.PracState as ProvState
,left(addr.PracZip,5) as ProvZip
,addr.Praccountry as ProvCountry
,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.MailPhone)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.MailPhone, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as ProvMailPhone
,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.MailFax)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.MailFax, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as ProvMailFax
,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.PracPhone)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.PracPhone, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as ProvLocPhone
,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.PracFax)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.PracFax, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as ProvLocFax
,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.AuthPhone)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.AuthPhone, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as ProvAuthPhone
,Taxo as ProvTaxonomy
,Specialty as ProvSpecialty
,CMSApproved as ProvCMSApprv
,RAApproved as ProvRAApprv
from CP_NPPES_Entity ent
join CP_NPPES_HumanNames hum
on ent.NPI = hum.NPI
join CP_NPPES_Addresses addr
on ent.NPI = addr.NPI
left join CP_NPPES_PhoneFax phon
on ent.NPI = phon.NPI
left join (select NPI,max(Taxo) Taxo from CP_NPPES_Taxo where ifnull(TaxoSwitch,'') = 'Y' group by NPI) taxo
on ent.NPI = taxo.NPI
left join ProviderSpecialtyDataset psm
on taxo.Taxo = psm.TaxonomyCode
left join CP_NPPES_Deact dea
on ent.NPI = dea.NPI
where ent.EntityType = 1 and ent.Warning is null and dea.NPI is null
),
ChasePractice as (
select distinct 
          ent.NPI,
          case when org.OrgName_LBN <>addr.Prac1stAddr then org.OrgName_LBN
               when org.OrgName_LBN = addr.Prac1stAddr and ifnull(org.OthOrgName,'') <>'' then org.OthOrgName
               when org.OrgName_LBN = addr.Prac1stAddr and ifnull(org.ParentOrgLBN,'') <>'' then org.ParentOrgLBN
                                       else org.OrgName_LBN end PracLegalName
         ,case when org.OthOrgName <>'' then org.OthOrgName else NULL end as PracOtherName
         ,case when org.ParentOrgLBN <>'' then org.ParentOrgLBN else NULL end as PracParentOrgName
         ,ent.Group as PracIsGroup
         ,addr.Prac1stAddr as PracAddr1
         ,case when ifnull(addr.Prac2ndAddr,'') <>'' then addr.Prac2ndAddr else NULL end as PracAddr2
         ,addr.PracCity as PracCity
        ,addr.PracState as PracState
        ,left(addr.PracZip,5) as PracZip
       ,addr.PracCountry as PracCountry
         ,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.MailPhone)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.MailPhone, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as PracMailPhone
	,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.MailFax)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.MailFax, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as PracMailFax
	,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.PracPhone)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.PracPhone, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as PracLocPhone
	,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.PracFax)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.PracFax, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as PracLocFax
	,case when ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(phon.AuthPhone)),'') <> '' then replace(replace(replace(replace(phon.AuthPhone, '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-','') else NULL END as PracAuthPhone
      ,Taxo as PracTaxonomy
	  ,Specialty as PracSpecialty
      ,CMSApproved as PracCMSApprv
	  ,RAApproved as PracRAApprv
from CP_NPPES_Entity ent 
join CP_NPPES_OrgNames org on ent.NPI = org.NPI
join CP_NPPES_Addresses addr on ent.NPI = addr.NPI
left join CP_NPPES_PhoneFax phon on ent.NPI = phon.NPI
left join (select NPI,max(Taxo) Taxo from CP_NPPES_Taxo where ifnull(TaxoSwitch,'') = 'Y' group by NPI) taxo  on ent.NPI = taxo.NPI
left join ProviderSpecialtyDataset psm on taxo.Taxo = psm.TaxonomyCode
left join CP_NPPES_Deact dea on ent.NPI = dea.NPI
 where ent.EntityType = 2 and ent.Warning is null and dea.NPI is null
),
specialty_CTE as (
select ProviderID, NPI from (
select pm.ProviderID, pm.NPI, specialty
FROM tblProviderMaster pm
left join CP_NPPES_Entity ent
 on pm.NPI = ent.NPI
left join (select NPI,max(Taxo) Taxo from CP_NPPES_Taxo where IFNULL(TaxoSwitch,'') = 'Y' group by NPI) taxo  
on ent.NPI = taxo.NPI
left join ProviderSpecialtyDataset psm on taxo.Taxo = psm.TaxonomyCode
WHERE IFNULL(pm.NPI,'') <> '' and IFNULL(pm.NPI,'') <> 'NOPCP'
) d
where specialty is null 
group by ProviderID, NPI
),
Final_CTE as (
SELECT DISTINCT 
CAST(pm.ProviderID as STRING) as ProviderID,
CAST(pm.NPI as STRING) as NPI,
 CAST(IFNULL(pro.NPI, prac.NPI)  as STRING) as PracticeNPI,
CAST(CASE WHEN pm.FirstName NOT LIKE 'FirstN%' THEN pm.FirstName
                                     WHEN pro.ProvFirstName IS NOT NULL THEN pro.ProvFirstName
                                     WHEN prac.PracLegalname IS NOT NULL THEN NULL
                            ELSE NULL END as STRING) as ProviderFirstName,
CAST(CASE WHEN pm.LastName NOT LIKE 'LastN%' THEN pm.LastName
                                     WHEN pro.ProvFirstName IS NOT NULL THEN pro.ProvFirstName
                                     WHEN prac.PracLegalname IS NOT NULL THEN NULL
                            ELSE NULL END as STRING) as ProviderLastName,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pm.AddressLine1,'') <> '' THEN pm.AddressLine1
                                   WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvAddr1,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvAddr1
                                   WHEN ifnull(prac.PracAddr1,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracAddr1
                          ELSE NULL END as STRING) as AddressLine1,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pm.AddressLine2,'') <> '' THEN pm.AddressLine2
                                    WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvAddr2,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvAddr2
                                    WHEN ifnull(prac.PracAddr2,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracAddr2
                           ELSE NULL END  as STRING) as AddressLine2,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pm.City,'') <> '' THEN pm.City
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvCity,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvCity
WHEN ifnull(prac.Praccity,'') <> '' THEN prac.Praccity
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as City,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pm.State,'') <> '' THEN pm.State
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvState,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvState
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracState,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracState
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as State,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pm.ZipCode,'') <> '' THEN pm.ZipCode
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvZip,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvZip
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracZip,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracZip
ELSE NULL END  as STRING) as ZipCode,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(pm.FaxNumber)),'') <> '' THEN right(replace(replace(replace(replace(ltrim(rtrim(pm.FaxNumber)), '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-',''),10)
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvLocPhone,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvLocPhone
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracLocPhone,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracLocPhone
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as PhoneNumber,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(ltrim(rtrim(pm.FaxNumber)),'') <> '' THEN right(replace(replace(replace(replace(ltrim(rtrim(pm.FaxNumber)), '(',''),')',''),' ',''),'-',''),10)
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvLocFax,'') <> '' THEN pro.ProvLocFax
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracLocFax,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracLocFax ELSE NULL END as STRING) as FaxNumber,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pm.ContactPerson,'') <> '' THEN pm.ContactPerson
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as ContactPerson,
CAST(pm.TIN as STRING) as ProviderTIN,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(psd.TaxonomyCode,'') <> ''  THEN psd.TaxonomyCode
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvTaxonomy,'') <> ''  THEN pro.ProvTaxonomy
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracTaxonomy,'') <> ''  THEN prac.PracTaxonomy
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as TaxonomyCode,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(pss.Specialty,'') <> ''  THEN pss.Specialty
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvSpecialty,'') <> ''  THEN pro.ProvSpecialty
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracSpecialty,'') <> '' THEN prac.PracSpecialty
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as Specialty,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(psd.TaxonomyCode,'') <> ''  THEN pss.CMSApproved
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvCMSApprv,'') <> ''  THEN pro.ProvCMSApprv 
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracCMSApprv,'') <> ''  THEN prac.PracCMSApprv
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as CMSApproved,
CAST(CASE WHEN ifnull(psd.TaxonomyCode,'') <> ''  THEN pss.RAApproved
WHEN ifnull(pro.ProvRAApprv,'') <> ''  THEN pro.ProvRAApprv
WHEN ifnull(prac.PracRAApprv,'') <> ''  THEN prac.PracRAApprv
ELSE NULL END as STRING) as RAApproved,
CAST(pm.ProviderSourceID as STRING) as ProviderSourceID
FROM tblProviderMaster pm 
LEFT JOIN ChaseProvider pro ON pm.NPI = pro.NPI
LEFT JOIN ChasePractice prac ON pm.NPI = prac.NPI
LEFT OUTER JOIN (
SELECT ProviderMaster_WK, MIN(TaxonomyCode) TaxonomyCode FROM tblProviderSpecialtyDetail 
GROUP BY ProviderMaster_WK
) psd ON pm.ProviderMaster_WK = psd.ProviderMaster_WK
LEFT JOIN ProviderSpecialtyDataSet pss ON psd.TaxonomyCode = pss.TaxonomyCode
WHERE ifnull(pm.NPI,'') <> '' and ifnull(pm.NPI,'') <> 'NOPCP'
)
select ProviderID,NPI,PracticeNPI,ProviderFirstName,ProviderLastName,AddressLine1,AddressLine2,City,State,ZipCode,PhoneNumber,FaxNumber,ContactPerson,ProviderTIN,TaxonomyCode,Specialty,CMSApproved,RAApproved,ProviderSourceID	  
from (
select s.ProviderID,s.NPI,s.PracticeNPI,s.ProviderFirstName,s.ProviderLastName,s.AddressLine1,s.AddressLine2,s.City,s.State,s.ZipCode,s.PhoneNumber,s.FaxNumber,s.ContactPerson,s.ProviderTIN,s.TaxonomyCode,s.Specialty,s.CMSApproved,s.RAApproved,s.ProviderSourceID,
ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY s.ProviderID,s.NPI,s.specialty ORDER BY s.ProviderLastName,s.ProviderFirstName, s.AddressLine1,s.City,s.State,s.ZipCode,s.PhoneNumber,s.FaxNumber,s.ContactPerson,s.ProviderTIN,s.TaxonomyCode,s.ProviderSourceID,s.AddressLine2,s.ContactPerson,s.ProviderTIN DESC) RN	   	  
from final_CTE s 
) a 
where RN = 1
and (specialty is not null OR (specialty is null and providerId + NPI in (select providerId + NPI from specialty_CTE)) )
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
with source_cte as (
select case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then providerID else s_providerID end as providerID,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then NPI else s_NPI end as NPI,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then PracticeNPI else s_PracticeNPI end as PracticeNPI,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then ProviderFirstName else s_ProviderFirstName end as ProviderFirstName,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then ProviderLastName else s_ProviderLastName end as ProviderLastName,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then AddressLine1 else s_AddressLine1 end as AddressLine1,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then AddressLine2 else s_AddressLine2 end as AddressLine2,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then City else s_City end as City,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then State else s_State end as State,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then ZipCode else s_ZipCode end as ZipCode,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then PhoneNumber else s_PhoneNumber end as PhoneNumber,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then FaxNumber else s_FaxNumber end as FaxNumber,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then ContactPerson else s_ContactPerson end as ContactPerson,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then ProviderTIN else s_ProviderTIN end as ProviderTIN,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then TaxonomyCode else s_TaxonomyCode end as TaxonomyCode,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then Specialty else s_Specialty end as Specialty,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then CMSApproved else s_CMSApproved end as CMSApproved,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then RAApproved else s_RAApproved end as RAApproved,
case when source = 'RecordsToDelete' then ProviderSourceID else s_ProviderSourceID end as ProviderSourceID,
Source
from (
SELECT ss.providerID as s_providerID,
ss.NPI as s_NPI, 
ss.PracticeNPI as s_PracticeNPI,
ss.ProviderFirstName as s_ProviderFirstName,
ss.ProviderLastName as s_ProviderLastName,
ss.AddressLine1 as s_AddressLine1,
ss.AddressLine2 as s_AddressLine2,
ss.City as s_City,
ss.State as s_State,
ss.ZipCode as s_ZipCode,
ss.PhoneNumber as s_PhoneNumber,
ss.FaxNumber as s_FaxNumber,
ss.ContactPerson as s_ContactPerson,
ss.ProviderTIN as s_ProviderTIN,
ss.TaxonomyCode as s_TaxonomyCode,
ss.Specialty as s_Specialty,
ss.CMSApproved as s_CMSApproved,
ss.RAApproved as s_RAApproved,
ss.ProviderSourceID as s_ProviderSourceID,
dt.*,
CASE  WHEN IFNULL(ss.NPI,'') = '' AND IFNULL(dt.NPI,'') <>'' THEN 'RecordsToDelete'  
      WHEN ifnull(ss.ProviderID,'')=ifnull(dt.ProviderID,'')
			and ifnull(ss.NPI,'')=ifnull(dt.NPI,'')			
			and ifnull(ss.Specialty,'')=ifnull(dt.Specialty,'') THEN 'RecordsToUpdate' 
      ELSE 'RecordsToInsert' END AS Source 
FROM tempSQLScript ss 
FULL OUTER JOIN  DestinationTable dt 
ON ifnull(ss.ProviderID,'')=ifnull(dt.ProviderID,'')
and ifnull(ss.NPI,'')=ifnull(dt.NPI,'')
and ifnull(ss.Specialty,'')=ifnull(dt.Specialty,'')
) a
)

MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING source_cte as  s 
ON ifnull(t.ProviderID,'')=ifnull(s.ProviderID,'')
and ifnull(t.NPI,'')=ifnull(s.NPI,'')
and ifnull(t.Specialty,'')=ifnull(s.Specialty,'')
WHEN MATCHED AND  s.Source = 'RecordsToDelete' 
THEN DELETE
WHEN MATCHED AND s.Source = 'RecordsToUpdate' 
THEN UPDATE 
SET t.ProviderID=s.ProviderID,
t.NPI=s.NPI,
t.PracticeNPI=s.PracticeNPI,
t.ProviderFirstName=s.ProviderFirstName,
t.ProviderLastName=s.ProviderLastName,
t.AddressLine1=s.AddressLine1,
t.AddressLine2=s.AddressLine2,
t.City=s.City,
t.State=s.State,
t.ZipCode=s.ZipCode,
t.PhoneNumber=s.PhoneNumber,
t.FaxNumber=s.FaxNumber,
t.ContactPerson=s.ContactPerson,
t.ProviderTIN=s.ProviderTIN,
t.TaxonomyCode=s.TaxonomyCode,
t.Specialty=s.Specialty,
t.CMSApproved=s.CMSApproved,
t.RAApproved=s.RAApproved,
t.ProviderSourceID=s.ProviderSourceID

WHEN NOT MATCHED AND s.Source ='RecordsToInsert' 
THEN INSERT (ProviderID,
NPI,
PracticeNPI,
ProviderFirstName,
ProviderLastName,
AddressLine1,
AddressLine2,
City,
State,
ZipCode,
PhoneNumber,
FaxNumber,
ContactPerson,
ProviderTIN,
TaxonomyCode,
Specialty,
CMSApproved,
RAApproved,
ProviderSourceID
)  VALUES (s.ProviderID,
s.NPI,
s.PracticeNPI,
s.ProviderFirstName,
s.ProviderLastName,
s.AddressLine1,
s.AddressLine2,
s.City,
s.State,
s.ZipCode,
s.PhoneNumber,
s.FaxNumber,
s.ContactPerson,
s.ProviderTIN,
s.TaxonomyCode,
s.Specialty,
s.CMSApproved,
s.RAApproved,
s.ProviderSourceID
)
